shape_decode: cmp,vp,vpc,naive = W,_,W,L  -> cmplog and value_profile_cmplog RESOLVE, naive BLOCKS, value_profile NON-DECISIVE. Pure i2s-pro family: I2S (input-to-state substitution) is the resolving technique; the value-profile gradient adds nothing decisive.

hypotheses.label: I2S enriches the cmplog corpus with the exact CMP-target byte(s) at the gate offset (literal substitution), which naive's blind havoc cannot place

params.gate_target_value: per-branch W (CMP-target) byte(s) at the fixed gate offset
params.gate_decoy_value: per-branch L (loser-occupying) byte(s) at the same offset

hypotheses.prediction: signed_target_enrich > 0: the cmplog corpus is log2-enriched (vs naive) for the exact target byte value at the fixed gate offset. DISCRIMINATING because an i2s-pro literal-substitution mechanism deterministically plants the CMP operand at that one offset, so its corpus concentrates on the target value; a NON-i2s explanation (naive reaches it by coverage gradient, or the gate is not an I2S value gate) predicts signed_target_enrich ~ 0. G2-independent: enrichment is measured on the saved CORPUS bytes at the gate offset, not on which fuzzer resolved.

hypotheses.label: I2S repairs interdependent multi-field structure (ELF section table / PNG iTXt chunk grammar / XML scheme+attribute parse) so the winner corpus drives the gated loop/branch line DEEPER per seed than the loser, rather than flipping a single fixed-offset literal

params.branch_line: per-branch gate line (bloaty section_count loop guards; libpng tRNS/PLTE allocation + num_trans transparency lines)

hypotheses.prediction: depth_lift > 1 AND winner_deeper=true: the winner-resolving seeds execute the gated loop/branch line MORE per seed than the loser-blocking seeds, because I2S repaired enough of the surrounding multi-field structure for the parser to advance through it. DISCRIMINATING: a pure single-literal-substitution alternative flips the branch with EQUAL reach (depth_lift ~ 1); a STRUCTURAL-assembly mechanism predicts the winner reaches the gate region substantially deeper per seed. This also rules out operand_enrichment as the operative signal, since these gates have NO single fixed offset (operand_enrichment returns no_gate_signature). G2-independent: depth_lift is a per-seed-normalized execution-count ratio at the branch line from llvm-cov, NOT from which fuzzer resolved.

hypotheses.label: I2S plants the exact multi-byte CMP operand literal SOMEWHERE in the cmplog corpus (at a variable / floating chunk offset), so the I2S arm's seeds reach Hamming-distance ~0 to the operand anywhere in the buffer while naive's blind-havoc corpus stalls far away -- the offset-agnostic reach signal that per-gate-offset byte-frequency (operand_enrichment) misses when the literal does not pin to one fixed offset

params.note: byte/string mode (not --numeric); width >= 3 for every member so the value_distance_reached short-operand (width<=2) chance-alignment caveat does NOT apply

hypotheses.prediction: cmp_min_distance ~ 0 AND distance_gap > 0 AND winner_closer=true: the cmplog (I2S) corpus contains a seed whose sliding window matches the operand literal exactly (residual ~0), while naive's closest seed stays a measurable Hamming distance away. DISCRIMINATING and genuinely NEW vs the two prior tests for these branches: (a) it is OFFSET-AGNOSTIC, so it fires where operand_enrichment (per-gate-offset) returned ~0 because the literal floats across variable chunk positions rather than pinning to one fixed gate offset -- the exact reason the prior i2s_fixed_offset_literal_substitution rule did NOT hold here; (b) it asks whether the operand was REACHED at all, not how deeply the gated loop iterated, so it fires where depth_reach (depth_lift) was ~1 because the gate is a one-shot dispatch equality, not a loop. A non-I2S alternative (naive lands the multi-byte literal by havoc) predicts naive_min_distance ~ 0 too (distance_gap ~ 0). G2-independent: value_distance_reached reads what each arm's saved seeds REACHED (min sliding-window Hamming to the operand), never the resolve pattern.
hypotheses.rule: winner_closer == true AND distance_closure_ratio >= 0.5 AND cmp_min_distance <= 0.1

data_realities_respected: No seed_lineage:event_cooccurrence 'I2S event' descriptor is proposed (I2S is untagged in mutation_op).

value_profile is treated as a non-decisive feedback for this shape (vp = '_'); no descriptor attributes a gradient mutation to it. value_distance_reached is used with winner=cmplog (the I2S arm) vs loser=naive -- a valid I2S-reach question (did the I2S arm reach the operand?), NOT a vp-gradient claim.

byte_freq_ratio (operand_enrichment) is applied ONLY to fixed-offset, byte-aligned value gates. Offset-floating multibyte literals are routed to value_distance_reached (offset-agnostic sliding-window Hamming), respecting the data_reality that byte-alignment fails on different-sized / variable-offset seeds.

Every value_distance_reached member has operand width >= 3, so the tool's short-operand (width<=2) chance-alignment caveat is not triggered; single-byte / derived-integer gates are NOT routed here (they are decidable:false instead).

Corpus/seed tools score only targets whose corpus exists on the OWNING server (curl/harfbuzz/openthread/sqlite3 on s4; lcms/libxml2/libpng/bloaty on sB). Branches are NOT marked decidable:false for absent-on-s4 corpus; the owning server arbitrates its own targets (libpng/libxml2/bloaty seeds + cov images live on sB).
depth_reach needs the target cov image + resolving/blocking seeds in db/blockers.sqlite; libpng, libxml2, and bloaty have those on sB (the 286 reps carry seeds).

notes.priors_kept: KEPT both prior KEEP hypotheses VERBATIM in measurement, metrics, and rule: (1) i2s_fixed_offset_literal_substitution (operand_enrichment, signed_target_enrich >= 1.0) and (2) i2s_structural_assembly_depth (depth_reach, depth_lift >= 1.5 AND winner_deeper). The 37 confirmed branches re-validate against these two unchanged rules. I removed from these two hypotheses' applies_to_branches the UNLABELED members that the prior test SCORED-AND-FAILED (rule_not_met) -- those are routed to the new hypothesis or to decidable:false below -- but the rules themselves are untouched, so the monotonic/superset guarantee holds for every confirmed branch.
notes.new_mechanism: ADDED ONE genuinely-new, not-previously-tried hypothesis i2s_operand_reached_offset_agnostic using the BUILT value_distance_reached tool (a brief-flagged pivot NOT used by the prior test). Mechanism: I2S plants the exact multi-byte CMP operand literal at a VARIABLE/floating offset (PNG chunk-type FOURCCs appear at whichever chunk position the parser walks to: 0x25, 0x35, ...; the BOM/'xml'/'http://[' prefixes likewise float), so per-gate-offset byte-frequency (operand_enrichment) dilutes to ~0 -- the exact reason the prior fixed-offset rule scored rule_not_met -- whereas the offset-agnostic sliding-window Hamming reach (value_distance_reached) sees the I2S arm land distance ~0 to the operand while naive stalls. This is distinct from depth_reach (asks REACHED-the-operand, not loop-iteration-depth, so it fires on one-shot dispatch equalities where depth_lift ~ 1) and is falsifiable + discriminating (G1: a non-I2S alternative predicts naive reaches the literal too -> distance_gap ~ 0). Members (all operand width >= 3): libpng_3887 (PLTE), libpng_3902 (tRNS), libpng_3820 (iTXt->Z_OK), libpng_4051 (iTXt + degenerate keyword), libxml2_6359_h0 (UTF-8 BOM), libxml2_6946 ('xml'), libxml2_6976 ('http://[' scheme prefix).
notes.decidable_false_subgroup: Marked 12 of the 19 unlabeled branches decidable:false -- an honest inconclusive, NOT a forced label. (A) SINGLE-BYTE / derived-integer / correlated-multifield gates with no clean discriminable operand-reach signal: I2S substitution is byte-for-byte indistinguishable from havoc landing the same one byte (a sliding-window Hamming/magnitude residual is ~0 for BOTH arms on a width<=2 target, value_distance_reached's own short-operand chance-alignment caveat), operand_enrichment already scored rule_not_met, and depth_reach already scored rule_not_met (depth_lift < 1.5 -- the iteration-depth story was tried and refuted for these specific branches). Members: libpng_3892_h0 (color_type 0x03 at 0x19, 1 byte), libpng_3965_h0 (gAMA length != 4, numeric magnitude), libpng_4055_h0 (iTXt compression-info byte, 1 byte), libpng_4061_h0 (iTXt compression-flag byte, 1 byte), libxml2_6597_h1 (tab 0x09, 1 byte), libxml2_6909 (colon 0x3a, 1 byte), libxml2_7287 (leading 0xf9 derived header byte, width<=1 -- depth_reach already refuted), bloaty_87 and bloaty_90 (ELF section-table CORRELATED multi-field dwords with NO single fixed offset and NO single operand literal -- the only built per-branch signal was depth_reach, which scored rule_not_met; a sliding-window distance has no single target to approach across the dispersed correlated fields, and corpus_count_ratio is a non-discriminating saved-entry proxy). (B) NON-MATCH / presence gates where the winner takes the FALSE side of an equality or fires a once-per-document presence check, so there is NO operand literal to REACH (value_distance_reached inapplicable), no fixed offset (operand_enrichment inapplicable), and no loop depth (depth_reach degenerate -- side_lift would be ~tautological with the resolve pattern that DEFINED the shape, violating G2). Members: libxml2_6205 (winner takes the ns != 'xmlns' FALSE side -- 'I2S planted a non-xmlns prefix' vs 'parse simply advanced' is not separable by any built tool), libxml2_6930 and libxml2_7250 (xmlFreeDoc / xmlTextReaderFreeDoc 'if (cur->oldNs != NULL)' once-per-document namespace-presence). Total 12 (9 in bucket A + 3 in bucket B); the remaining 7 unlabeled go to i2s_operand_reached_offset_agnostic. Honest inconclusive is the correct outcome; the fallback carries the 12.
notes.scope_and_caveats: Decision order tries operand_enrichment first (cheapest, fixed-offset literals), then the new offset-agnostic value_distance_reached (seed-byte sliding window, no Docker), then depth_reach (Docker-per-branch ~30-60s, needs the cov image). value_distance_reached + operand_enrichment both score only on the owning server's on-disk corpora (libpng/libxml2/bloaty on sB); any member missing its corpus or >=1 W/>=1 L seed on the owning server falls to the inconclusive fallback automatically. The value_distance_reached rule pairs a categorical winner_closer guard with distance_closure_ratio >= 0.5 AND cmp_min_distance <= 0.1 so a near-tie (both arms reach the literal, distance_gap ~ 0) does NOT produce a spurious label -- exactly the falsification condition that distinguishes I2S-reach from havoc-reach. No NEW descriptor is proposed: the three built tools cover every discriminable hypothesis in this shape; corpus_size_ratio/token_count/joint_necessity were considered but corpus_count_ratio (saved-entry count) is a non-discriminating proxy for the assembly story (count inflation has many causes) and joint_necessity targets the vpc-needs-both joint subtype which this pure-I2S shape does not contain, so neither is wired in.
